name: sillytaily
description: SillyTavern Desktop - Windows native desktop application

scripts.compile: tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json && node scripts/copy-renderer.js
scripts.build: pnpm run compile && pnpm run prepare:st && electron-builder
scripts.build:win: pnpm run compile && pnpm run prepare:st && electron-builder --win
